title: Update traceability — add CitationAcceptanceCount to IssueRef and AcceptedRiskNodes/AcceptedRiskPct to Coverage
definition_of_done: CitationAcceptanceCount int on IssueRef; AcceptedRiskNodes int and AcceptedRiskPct float64 on Coverage; Compute updated; TestCompute_AllSourceLinked, TestCompute_MixedCitation, TestCompute_BothSourceLinkAndAcceptance_CountsAsSourceLinked pass; make check green
outcome: Added CitationAcceptanceCount to IssueRef, AcceptedRiskNodes/AcceptedRiskPct to Coverage; Compute updated to track accepted-risk separately; 3 new tests pass; make check green

notes.msg: Added CitationAcceptanceCount int to IssueRef, AcceptedRiskNodes int and AcceptedRiskPct float64 to Coverage. Updated Compute to classify issues with no source link but >=1 CitationAcceptance as accepted risk. Updated pipeline.go to populate CitationAcceptanceCount from len(issue.CitationAcceptances). All three required tests pass. make check green: 363 tests, 0 failures.

decisions.choice: accepted-risk = no source link AND CitationAcceptanceCount > 0; issue still appears in Uncited
decisions.rationale: An acceptance record is a deliberate risk decision, not a citation. The issue remains uncited (no source link) but is separately tracked as accepted risk so callers can distinguish gaps from conscious risk acceptance.
